title: WIPO Collection of Leading Judgments on Intellectual Property Rights: People’s Republic of China (2019–2023)
content: This casebook of judgments by the Supreme People's Court of the People's Republic of China in the WIPO Collection of Leading Judgments on Intellectual Property Rights series covers decisions rendered between 2019 and 2023. The WIPO Collection gives the global intellectual property community access to landmark judgments from some of the most dynamic litigation jurisdictions of the world, through a succession of volumes that illustrate intellectual property adjudication approaches and trends by jurisdiction or by theme.
